message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for copy + sort + scan (br-frankenredis-cmn3, ulw1, h2dv)

First-run parity vs vendored redis-server:
  - core_copy: 99/102 pass, 3 divergences (ao1i)
  - core_sort: 88/88 pass ✓
  - core_scan: 91/113 pass, 22 divergences (hjzc)

Divergences filed as [HIGH] review beads:
  - ao1i: COPY src==dst returns 0/1 instead of error + RESTORE BUSYKEY
          precedence
  - hjzc: SCAN-family iteration order + invalid-cursor wording + 7.4
          NOVALUES support delta vs vendored 7.2.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
